sentence: 公司每周五出版一份周报，总结本周要闻。
pinyin: Gōng sī měi zhōu wǔ chū bǎn yī fèn zhōu bào, zǒng jié běn zhōu yào wén.
english: The company publishes a weekly newsletter every Friday summarizing the week's top news.

meaning: soccer association; soccer federation (abbr. for 足球協會|足球协会[zu2 qiu2 xi
sentence: 足协宣布下赛季将增加联赛队伍。
pinyin: Zú xié xuān bù xià sài jì jiāng zēng jiā lián sài duì wǔ.
english: The soccer association announced that more teams will be added to the league next season.

meaning: parents of one's daughter-in-law or son-in-law; relatives by marriage
sentence: 两家亲家昨天第一次见面，相谈甚欢。
pinyin: Liǎng jiā qìng jia zuó tiān dì yī cì jiàn miàn, xiāng tán shèn huān.
english: The two families, related by their children's marriage, met for the first time yesterday and got along very well.

sentence: 农民每年要向地主缴纳地租。
pinyin: Nóng mín měi nián yào xiàng dì zhǔ jiǎo nà dì zū.
english: Farmers had to pay land rent to the landlord every year.

sentence: 这首曲子用了小调式，听起来有些忧伤。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu qǔ zi yòng le xiǎo diào shì, tīng qǐ lái yǒu xiē yōu shāng.
english: This piece uses a minor mode, which makes it sound somewhat melancholy.

meaning: to fail to meet each other; to conflict with each other; to be at odds
sentence: 两人的意见相左，一时难以达成共识。
pinyin: Liǎng rén de yì jiàn xiāng zuǒ, yī shí nán yǐ dá chéng gòng shí.
english: The two of them had conflicting opinions and couldn't reach an agreement for a while.

sentence: 他在多家金融机构工作过，经验丰富。
pinyin: Tā zài duō jiā jīn róng jī gòu gōng zuò guò, jīng yàn fēng fù.
english: He has worked at several financial institutions and has a wealth of experience.

sentence: 村子距离镇上大约有十华里路。
pinyin: Cūn zi jù lí zhèn shàng dà yuē yǒu shí huá lǐ lù.
english: The village is about ten li from the town.

sentence: 公司任用新人时非常注重实际能力。
pinyin: Gōng sī rèn yòng xīn rén shí fēi cháng zhù zhòng shí jì néng lì.
english: When appointing new employees, the company places great emphasis on practical skills.

meaning: online; network; to connect online; to connect an electronic device to
sentence: 请先联机到服务器，才能开始游戏。
pinyin: Qǐng xiān lián jī dào fú wù qì, cái néng kāi shǐ yóu xì.
english: Please connect to the server first before starting the game.

meaning: to meet (or pick up) sb arriving by plane; (of airport staff) to deal
sentence: 她特意去机场接机，等了两个小时。
pinyin: Tā tè yì qù jī chǎng jiē jī, děng le liǎng gè xiǎo shí.
english: She went to the airport especially to pick someone up and waited two hours.

meaning: male cousin through a female relative
sentence: 我有三个表兄弟，过年时大家都会聚在一起。
pinyin: Wǒ yǒu sān gè biǎo xiōng dì, guò nián shí dà jiā dōu huì jù zài yī qǐ.
english: I have three male cousins, and we all get together during the New Year.

sentence: 十九世纪，英法两国在海外争夺殖民地。
pinyin: Shí jiǔ shì jì, Yīng Fǎ liǎng guó zài hǎi wài zhēng duó zhí mín dì.
english: In the nineteenth century, Britain and France competed for colonies overseas.

sentence: 别闹事，出了乱子谁都担不起责任。
pinyin: Bié nào shì, chū le luàn zi shuí dōu dān bù qǐ zé rèn.
english: Don't cause trouble — if something goes wrong, nobody can take responsibility.

meaning: New style, latest fashion, new model
sentence: 这家店刚到了几款新款手机。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn gāng dào le jǐ kuǎn xīnkuǎn shǒujī.
english: This store just received several new-model smartphones.

sentence: 打印机没墨了，得去买墨盒。
pinyin: Dǎyìnjī méi mò le, děi qù mǎi mòhé.
english: The printer is out of ink; I need to go buy a new cartridge.

meaning: 1. deep emotion; 2. deep feeling; 3. deep love
sentence: 她深情地望着窗外的风景。
pinyin: Tā shēnqíng de wàng zhe chuāng wài de fēngjǐng.
english: She gazed affectionately at the scenery outside the window.

meaning: 1. to pay (expenses); 2. expenses; 3. (old) to dismiss (an employee)
sentence: 在北京生活，每月的开销不小。
pinyin: Zài Běijīng shēnghuó, měi yuè de kāixiāo bù xiǎo.
english: Living in Beijing, the monthly expenses are quite significant.

sentence: 运动后要及时饮水补充水分。
pinyin: Yùndòng hòu yào jíshí yǐnshuǐ bǔchōng shuǐfèn.
english: After exercising, you should drink water promptly to rehydrate.

sentence: 这部电影讲述了人类与外星生命相遇的故事。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng jiǎngshù le rénlèi yǔ wàixīng shēngmìng xiāngyù de gùshi.
english: This movie tells the story of humans encountering extraterrestrial life.

sentence: 她大学选修了人类学课程，发现很有趣。
pinyin: Tā dàxué xuǎnxiū le rénlèixué kèchéng, fāxiàn hěn yǒuqù.
english: She took an anthropology elective in college and found it very interesting.

sentence: 切洋葱的时候眼睛总是会流泪。
pinyin: Qiē yángcōng de shíhou yǎnjīng zǒng shì huì liú lèi.
english: My eyes always water when cutting onions.

sentence: 早期殖民者到达后改变了当地的生活方式。
pinyin: Zǎoqī zhímínzhě dào dá hòu gǎibiàn le dāngdì de shēnghuó fāngshì.
english: After the early colonists arrived, they changed the local way of life.

sentence: 我们每个月要还房贷，压力不小。
pinyin: Wǒmen měi gè yuè yào huán fángdài, yālì bù xiǎo.
english: We have to pay back the home loan every month; the pressure is significant.

meaning: 1. to insult; 2. to humiliate; 3. to bully
sentence: 任何人都不应该遭受语言上的凌辱。
pinyin: Rènhé rén dōu bù yīnggāi zāoshòu yǔyán shàng de língrǔ.
english: No one should have to endure verbal humiliation.

sentence: 她考上了市里最好的音乐学院，全家都很高兴。
pinyin: Tā kǎo shàng le shì lǐ zuì hǎo de yīnyuè xuéyuàn, quánjiā dōu hěn gāoxìng.
english: She got into the best music conservatory in the city; the whole family was thrilled.

meaning: 1. clutch (in car gearbox); 2. separation and reunion
sentence: 学开手动挡时，踩离合的时机很重要。
pinyin: Xué kāi shǒudòng dǎng shí, cǎi lígé de shíjī hěn zhòngyào.
english: When learning to drive a manual car, timing the clutch is very important.

sentence: 她在舞台上的表演让所有人惊艳。
pinyin: Tā zài wǔtái shàng de biǎoyǎn ràng suǒyǒu rén jīngyàn.
english: Her performance on stage left everyone dazzled.

sentence: 这条铁路线完成电气化改造后，运行速度大幅提升。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo tiělù xiàn wánchéng diànqìhuà gǎizào hòu, yùnxíng sùdù dàfú tíshēng.
english: After this railway line completed its electrification upgrade, operating speeds increased significantly.

sentence: 最近股票市场波动很大，很多人都不敢投资。
pinyin: Zuìjìn gǔpiào shìchǎng bōdòng hěn dà, hěn duō rén dōu bù gǎn tóuzī.
english: The stock market has been very volatile lately; many people are afraid to invest.

sentence: 公司新建了一座仓储中心。
pinyin: Gōngsī xīn jiàn le yī zuò cāngchǔ zhōngxīn.
english: The company built a new warehousing center.

sentence: 他花了三年写完这首长诗。
pinyin: Tā huā le sān nián xiě wán zhè shǒu cháng shī.
english: He spent three years finishing this long poem.

meaning: 1. remaining quantity; 2. reserves (of natural resources, oil etc)
sentence: 这个油田的储量非常丰富。
pinyin: Zhège yóutián de chǔliàng fēicháng fēngfù.
english: The reserves in this oil field are very abundant.

meaning: 1. to hang up (a phone); 2. to leave a computer etc running (idling, d
sentence: 电话说完就挂机，别等太久。
pinyin: Diànhuà shuō wán jiù guà jī, bié děng tài jiǔ.
english: Hang up as soon as you're done talking; don't wait too long.

sentence: 今年通胀让日常开销涨了不少。
pinyin: Jīnnián tōngzhàng ràng rìcháng kāixiāo zhǎng le bù shǎo.
english: This year's inflation has driven up everyday expenses quite a bit.

sentence: 他们在聊天室里认识了彼此。
pinyin: Tāmen zài liáotiānshì lǐ rènshi le bǐcǐ.
english: They got to know each other in a chat room.

meaning: 1. earnest money; 2. cash deposit; 3. bail; 4. margin (in derivative t
sentence: 租房时要先交一个月的保证金。
pinyin: Zū fáng shí yào xiān jiāo yī gè yuè de bǎozhèngjīn.
english: When renting an apartment you need to pay one month's deposit upfront.

meaning: 1. founder (of a craft, religious sect etc)
sentence: 他被徒弟们尊为武术的祖师。
pinyin: Tā bèi túdìmen zūn wéi wǔshù de zǔshī.
english: His disciples revere him as the founder of the martial art.

sentence: 这个农场基本上能做到蔬菜自给。
pinyin: Zhège nóngchǎng jīběn shàng néng zuò dào shūcài zìjǐ.
english: This farm is essentially self-sufficient in vegetables.

sentence: 他用拇指按了一下门铃。
pinyin: Tā yòng mǔzhǐ àn le yīxià ménlíng.
english: He pressed the doorbell with his thumb.

sentence: 她洗完的衬衫雪白雪白的。
pinyin: Tā xǐ wán de chènshān xuěbái xuěbái de.
english: The shirt she washed came out snow white.

meaning: 1. both ends (of a stick etc); 2. two extremes
sentence: 绳子的两端分别绑在树上。
pinyin: Shéngzi de liǎng duān fēnbié bǎng zài shù shàng.
english: Both ends of the rope are tied to trees.

sentence: 施工队正在加固公路的路基。
pinyin: Shīgōng duì zhèngzài jiāgù gōnglù de lùjī.
english: The construction crew is reinforcing the road's roadbed.

sentence: 我们在附近那家咖啡店见面吧。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài fùjìn nà jiā kāfēidiàn jiànmiàn ba.
english: Let's meet at that nearby coffee shop.

sentence: 这道菜给人很强的感官享受。
pinyin: Zhè dào cài gěi rén hěn qiáng de gǎnguān xiǎngshòu.
english: This dish gives a very strong sensory pleasure.

sentence: 这台显示器的分辨率很高，图像清晰。
pinyin: Zhè tái xiǎnshìqì de fēnbiànlǜ hěn gāo, túxiàng qīngxī.
english: This monitor has a very high resolution, so the image is sharp.

meaning: 1. to reassign sb to a different job; 2. to turn around; 3. to change
sentence: 他把车调转方向，往回开。
pinyin: Tā bǎ chē diàozhuǎn fāngxiàng, wǎng huí kāi.
english: He turned the car around and drove back.

meaning: 1. to ask sb to stay; 2. to keep sb for the night; 3. to await (classi
sentence: 好的工作环境才能留住人才。
pinyin: Hǎo de gōngzuò huánjìng cái néng liúzhù réncái.
english: A good work environment is what retains talent.

sentence: 这本书有好几个中文译本。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū yǒu hǎo jǐ gè Zhōngwén yìběn.
english: This book has several Chinese translations.

sentence: 她家有四个兄弟姐妹，很热闹。
pinyin: Tā jiā yǒu sì gè xiōngdì jiěmèi, hěn rènao.
english: Her family has four siblings; it's very lively.
